calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-27-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Carl Le.
Dept. 514. Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768. Email: casey.giselle@gmail.com.

Charlie W. Yu, Esq. appeared for plaintiff PM Lender Financial Services LLC.
Patrick Chee, Manager for plaintiff PM Lender Financial Services LLC, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Carl Le.
Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on August 29, 2018.
Order granting plaintiff's request to serve Summons by publication was filed on March 27, 2019.
Proof of Publication of Summons was filed on June 5, 2019.
Default as to defendant Carl Le was entered on June 13, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on June 13, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff PM Lender Financial Services LLC, and against the default defendant Carl Le, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $568,273.35.
Prejudgment Interest - $63,764.02.
Attorney Fees - $10,815.00.
Costs - $1,308.48.

Total - $644,160.85.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2019 Continued To Oct-02-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
